control.description-key: Generates signed Image-Charts QR Codes for Power Apps

property.name: accountId
property.description-key: Your Image-Charts Enterprise Account ID (icac). Leave empty if using Private Cloud mode.

property.name: secretKey
property.description-key: Your Image-Charts Enterprise Secret Key for HMAC-SHA256 signing. Leave empty if using Private Cloud mode.

property.name: privateCloudDomain
property.description-key: Your Image-Charts Private Cloud domain (e.g., charts.mycompany.com). When set, HMAC signing is not required.

property.name: qrData
property.description-key: The data to encode in the QR Code (e.g., a URL, text, or identifier)

property.name: chartSize
property.description-key: The size of the QR Code in pixels, format: WIDTHxHEIGHT (e.g., 300x300). Default: 300x300

property.name: qrForegroundColor
property.description-key: QR Code foreground color in RRGGBB hex format (e.g., 000000 for black). Accepts with or without # prefix. Default: 000000

property.name: qrBackgroundColor
property.description-key: QR Code background color in RRGGBB hex format (e.g., FFFFFF for white). Accepts with or without # prefix. Default: FFFFFF

property.name: errorCorrectionLevel
property.description-key: QR Code error correction level: L (7%), M (15%), Q (25%), or H (30%). Default: M

property.name: advancedOptions
property.description-key: Additional Image-Charts parameters in query string format: key=value&key2=value2 (e.g., chof=.svg&chld=H|4)

property.name: showDebugUrl
property.description-key: Display the generated URL below the QR Code for debugging purposes

property.name: errorPlaceholderUrl
property.description-key: Custom image URL to display when the chart fails to load

property.name: signedUrl
property.description-key: The full Image-Charts URL (signed if Enterprise mode). Read-only output.
